chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CTA No. 27 of 2023 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of case 05.05.2023 Mr. Sami Ahsan, advocate for the applicants -------------------- Service on respondent No.1 has been held good. No one is in appearance on behalf of respondent No.1. This is an application seeking consolidation of G&W Application No.1035 of 2023 pending before XIIIth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi (Central) with Family Suit No.1007 of 2011 pending before the XIVth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi (Central). The family suit is for maintenance and G&W Application is for custody. It is between same parties and involves the same minor. By an order dated 09.3.2023 passed in C.P. No.S-1010 of 2021 it was also suggested that both these matters i.e the suit and G&W Application be heard together. In the circumstances, the Family Suit No.1007 of 2011 is transferred from the Court XIVth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi (Central) to the Court of XIIIth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi (Central) to be heard along with G&W Application No.1035 of 2023. The application stands disposed of. J U D G E
